author: mj12albert
body:
Demo: https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/eloquent-wright-sff4fm

Adds a `formValues` object as the 2nd argument to `validate`, which enables validating a field based on the value of another field, e.g. `confirmPassword` and `password`

- [x] I have followed (at least) the [PR section of the contributing guide](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md#sending-a-pull-request).
title: [field] Enable custom validation based on other form values
